{{Infobox technique
| name = Azure Moon Reigns
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Azure Moon Reigns]] is a technique that combines a [[Forger]] and [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Azure Moon Reigns]] is a [[Ruler technique]] that pushes against water in the body to slow and make the target clumsy.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Azure Moon Reigns]] is a technique that gathers [[water aura]] and [[madra]] into a floating blue light.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Azure Moon Reigns]] is a technique used by Sophara that creates a sphere of sapphire [[madra]] and [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
